## Highlights

`feishu-md-sync@0.4.0` publishes canonical documentation sources through an explicit preprocessing dialect before applying the existing profile and sync safety model.

- Publish ordinary GFM, Zilliz Cloud Docusaurus, and Milvus authoring sources without leaking source-only syntax into Feishu.
- Resolve configured relative document links to Feishu documents through a read-only Base index, with one-hour local caching and stale-cache fallback.
- Record the selected dialect, used link mappings, link-resolution fingerprint, and exact prior publish draft in receipt V4.
- Fail closed on unsupported source constructs, ambiguous or unresolved links, and non-reconstructable automatic merge.
- Keep the version-matched Agent Skill on one explicit dialect across status, diff, publish, and final verification.

## Installation

Install the npm CLI and Agent Skill from the same release:

```bash
npm install --global feishu-md-sync@0.4.0
npx skills add 'liyun95/feishu-md-sync#v0.4.0' --skill feishu-md-sync --global --yes
```

The v0.4 Skill requires `feishu-md-sync >=0.4.0 <0.5.0`.

## Source dialects and profiles

Dialect describes source syntax; profile applies product wording after preprocessing.

| Source | Dialect | Profile |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Ordinary Markdown | `gfm` | `none` |
| Zilliz Cloud Docusaurus source | `docusaurus` | `none` |
| Milvus canonical source | `milvus-authoring` | `none` |
| Milvus source published with Zilliz wording | `milvus-authoring` | `zilliz` |

`gfm` and `none` remain the defaults. Automatic merge is available only for `gfm`; reconcile Docusaurus and Milvus authoring sources manually from a separate pull snapshot.

## Link-resolution safety

The configured Base resolver is strictly read-only. It lists tables and records through the official `lark-cli`; publishing never creates or edits Base records. Ambiguous and unresolved links block the complete plan.

When live Base refresh fails, a usable stale cache remains a warning. If resolution falls back to public-site URLs, the Agent Skill shows those URLs and waits for explicit user acceptance before any write. Confirmation flags cannot bypass dialect or link blockers.

## Included pull requests

- [#45](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/45) — source dialect preprocessing, read-only Base link resolution, receipt V4, and non-GFM merge safety.
- [#46](https://github.com/liyun95/feishu-md-sync/pull/46) — escaped Docusaurus heading-anchor cleanup.

## Known boundaries

- Automatic merge is unavailable for `docusaurus` and `milvus-authoring`.
- Whiteboard initialization still requires an existing remote image or Whiteboard match; direct SVG-only initialization is not supported.
- Complex nested-list canonicalization remains outside the supported scoped publish surface.

See the [Agent usage guide](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/guide/agent-usage), [configuration guide](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/guide/configuration), and [command reference](https://liyun95.github.io/feishu-md-sync/reference/commands) for the complete workflow.
